pricetiers.note: 3-tier contract pricing · {route:{zone:{paxType:{sell,minSell}}}} · seatRates stays the NET tier that booking bills from

targets.note: monthly pax target per salesperson · {"YYYY-MM": pax} · Sales Board finish line

followup.note: agents this salesperson marked handled · {"YYYY-MM::agentId": true} · Sales Board follow-up

contracttemplateid.note: which contract template this agent's contract is generated from · empty = the default template

value.note: whole template object as JSON: {id,code,name,active,isDefault,sections{},text{en{},th{}}} — new template fields need no DB change
